definitions: n. 不平衡 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text: One is the lopsidedness built into scientific research. Scientific funding goes mainly to areas with many problems. That may be wise policy, but it will also create an impression that many more potential problems exist than is the case.
examples.explanation: 一是科学研究中固有的不平衡。科学资金主要流向存在许多问题的领域。这可能是明智的政策，但也会造成一种印象，即潜在的问题比实际情况多得多。
